description: CompositionGrey shirt with the outer shell made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has mesh shell made of 100% polyester, 100% cotton inserts amd ribbing made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, has a round neck with full sleeves that have ribbed hems, and has branding on the front in print, velvet, flock print and embroideryFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetModerate warm ironWelcome the winter in style this season with this shirt from puma. The thick fabric is sure to keep the winter chill at bay, while the mesh keeps you sweat-free and comfortable all day. Wear this shirt over jeans to keep the cold winds away.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 6'3”; Shoulders: 19"
